reviews.review_description: This game used to be good, and if you haven’t gotten it yet. Don’t, you missed out on so much fun things but now the game sucks. The only way to get cool and good stuff is to pay money. This game is just eating down your money at this point. Another way to get cool stuff is to sweat the game 24/7 for shells to get things from the fish stop

THIS IS SO GOOD THERES SO MUCH TO EXPLORE THERES SHARKS SEA DRAGONS AND MORE PEOPLE WHO LIKE SEA CREATURES THIS IS A PERFECT GAME FOR THEM ITS SO GOOD THERES ALOT IN THIS GAME AND THERES WAVES IN BLOOPS THATS HOW TO GET MORE SEA CREATURES ANYWAY DOWNLOAD THIS GAME NOW IT THE BEST❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

The game seemed fun at first, then I learned that you need money. The 30$ shark is always the best and impossible to get f2p. Early game progression takes hours without help, and it's not clear what do to. And the kids who iv'e seen? Mostly jerks. They scream when someone new tries to help them kill something or get help, and exclude people if they haven't spent money. I'm sorry, but it just hasn't been fun f2p (free to play).

It’s a w game tbh but one thing it takes a while for updates to get released but you will get use to it. The game is not really “pay to win” but there still is a bundle in the game. Most kids are toxic but you gotta learn how to deal with it and if your giving this game a bad review just because of toxic kids then get out because it’s not the games fault it’s the toxic kids fault so please don’t leave a bad review because of some one being toxic! But overall it’s a great game to be free and it’s better than ug in my opinion so you should get game it’s fun and enjoyable.

￼ I was playing and then a new update dropped when I joined the new shop said that it looked like it was 50 shells only that I had but I actually had 7000 and then there was a refresh button and I clicked that over and over again, not knowing it cost 50 shells. There was no warning to say you’re spending 50 shells and I ended up spending $10 worth of shells that I actually bought with real money.

When I played the the community was really nice even helping me to get new sharks probably the best game I have ever played the reason why I wanted sharkzila back is I started playing when it just left knowing that it had voice control and played it because I wanted sharkzila but even though it really good game

This game is just a ripoff of the game ug, and it isn’t even good. It is definitely pay to win and is nearly impossible to unlock anything good. When something decent does drop, other players usually steal it. Verdict: my grandma can prob make a better game with her friends in the retirement community.

reviews.review_title: Don’t download if you dont spend money
reviews.review_description: If you like this game ok play Ug instead or play this everything is pay to win the e best thing is usually hidden behind a pay wall all currency is coped from gorila tag front to back this game is so bad do not recommend your better eating your money than spending money on this game give your money to help ocean life instead if you love oceans so much

Really confusing at first but once you get the hang of it very fun and cool. So basically what you do at the beginning is you get on your starter shark and defeat the angler fish they drop meat for your shark to eat by swimming into it once your shark is level 10 I recommend that you put the weapons on your shark at the place you go to hop on the shark there will be a screen with info on your shark to the right side of it there will be a weapons screen you grab the weapon of the screen and put on your shark in the green circles and that’s a basic tutorial for the game

10/10 This game is amazing. Smooth progression with various of sharks to collect. Even comes with weapons to customize your shark to your liking! There are multiple bosses of various difficulty, and plenty of skins for each shark. This game is very new, so expect a few bugs, just report them and they will be fixed! This game is a really fun way to cure boredom. Download the game, and I'll see ya in Shark Go!

So when I first started I loved it and I grinded so much that 2days and I almost have all the skins apart from extra skins so now Idk what to hunt and grind for now but please in this next update please add a bunch of hard and 100k and over bosses new bundle obviously and in the bloop pls add more bosses to battle to get rewards and last thing pls add alot more weapons and make new dimensions and increase the level cap. (Thank U for making such a good game I know this is alot but it could help U make it better😅😄😄😄😄)

This game graphics are so good. I love the bloop it’s fun to do is just that when you start there’s like no tutorial that’s the thing I had with trouble so then after that like after two or three days, you’re already a sweat but here’s the thing the bundles are too much like I could get like a $10 one but too much for $30 king of sharks by the way so they should act like a discount too. I’m not trying to be greedy but yeah and that’s all I have to say this is PS shark go you still haven’t gave me nightmare, mini guns

reviews.review_title: Very good, but a few things that bug me.
reviews.review_description: To be honest, the game is kind of bland, even though there is the Bloop, or the OMG. There are also bugs that can ruin the game, like glitches the bosses with drills so that nothing can spawn from them. I do like how many fish there are to play with, and how there is a nightmare mode. Also, its graphics are sorta mid on DA MONKE, but the animals are absolutely stunning. This is peak for a game that is in 0.9.0. 1 more thing, I hope to get the King Of Sharks. If you read this, thank for your time.

This game has got to be a really great grinding game the community is decent the bloop game mode is perfect for getting new fishies/sharks. (why do people call this game P2w when the sea dragon at level 10 is pretty much a bundle) but mainly this is a really great game perfect for grinding ￼and playing a little confusing at the start but hopefully they will add a tutorial for new players

This gameis really fun One More Game (aka bloop) is really fun and efficient to get more sharks i got my krokotron from bloop and most of my sharks from bloop and its a good way to get level ups and shells. The game also has a variety of sharks so at least one will fit your playstyle my favorite is krokotron

reviews.review_title: I love the nice people and the game
reviews.review_description:
Now, There are mean people in these servers people. but I'm glad I've met nice people in this game. They've helped me a lot. They were very, very nice. They're like the nicest people. I have ever met. They were so kind to me. They help me they.We're in for the first time.And I joined a new game they help me get very strong, powerful fish. I have not forgotten them at all. Most of my credit has gone out to I'm one of my best friends. They have helped me in multiple game like ug animal company gorilla tag rec rooms rest in peace. Wreck rooms.
But I love the game. The best game I have ever played most credit goes out to the admins who made this

It is really the best game in my life❤️💗🫡🙂🙂🤪

I think this game is really cool and fun, so fun I played it for 12 hours in one day. One thing I feel like they should add is load outs for your fish. By load outs I mean you can save certain gears onto a fish and change it back and forth without having to spend so much time changing everything

It's basically a game that you play with sharks and you can ride it by click y on your right controller or left before you do that you go very close it and you lvl up sharks and get better ones like me I got a sea dragon and a narwalh or whatever it is and a seal I call him a sea lion cause he looks like one and to earn credits in the game btw it's called shells and you claim it from the promo code thing or you join there discord or leave a review and I really like this game it is so fun a asome I would join there discord if I was you so yeah I hope you enjoyed this review I will hope on shark go now see you at shark go now bye ‼️💫😗

Literally the best game i even made a community called need sharks. But it is way to addictive and it is water my favorite element. Sharks are the best (please add a axolotl axolotls are cute and it's ability make it where it shoots water geysers that push) but overall best game in my opinion. 🏆

Okay i can say that this game is good but it is just hungry shark in vr but this is still pretty enjoyable but it should make bosses a little more harder and higher health Considering that once you have good stuff the bosses are just a joke but after all it is still a good game to recommend to people that love the ocean.

Yo guys this is better then ug they’re some much to do the people that are leaving bad reviews do lesson to them get this game play with your friends to if you are new to this game ask help in a private server with your friends you can get so much stuff in this game you can get a minngun and seal is so op if you know how to use it drill on it and three booster on the side and bottom to yo if the person that made this game see this game is 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

I think the games not even comparable to ug like this games like mad fun highly recommend it but new players will have some trouble liking the game but I promise give it a day or 2 and you will be playing for ever🫪🫪🫪🫪😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁😁👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍🫪🫪🫪🫪🫪👏👏👏👏

I just love the quality. It is amazing. It’s fun. There’s so much to do. It’s just one of the funniest games I’ve ever played and I do like the concept of like the nightmare nightmares in the weapons but the only thing that is a little icky is that you can get people to level up just for anchor coins, which some people like trick you doing that but I still very much love this game. It is amazing. I feel like there should also be a better way to get shells like every week you should be able to get 5000 so you can save up for the shop I in turtle in the shop Crocker Roan, so so if anyone is like looking at this like the game on, I was like really liked their things insisted as I say it again this is one of the best games I’ve ever ever played hero X hero is a good game too, but this game has just brought me tons of joy an amazing kind of game. It is just like the detail in every little thing the hours put into this game was probably a long time and I just respect that you respect those teeny little details and it’s just really amazing. I think that y’all created such a great amazing game that a lot of people play and I’m hoping this actually gets more popular than gorilla tag cause gorilla tag is yeah it’s a good game but there’s glitches and there is only a few glitches in shark go which you don’t need to patch them if you don’t want to, but this game is just I don’t know it’s like five star best game ever in the world hero hero as I said again it has barely any glitches. Neither does yawls game and I actually love both games with a lot of a lot of hope that this game continues being popular and great and amazing. This game is just this game has brought me an obsessive amount of joy over it.
￼

Today I was in a sever with a few "nice" kids. They helped me get seal and axolotl, but when I asked them to cash out, they started chanting "cash out kid", making fun of my weight, and also calling me the f word and n word. They also said I could NEVER get content creator. this made me very angry. To sum this all up, I love this game and the community is very nice, just there are some mean people. I hope to get a response back to this message

-Xx_stick_xX

This community is worse than ug’s community and the people discord are so rude like I was just asking why are they adding trading and the. They say it is f2p like me and then all I sayed was yea it is just going to be a mini version of ug and then I we got into an argument… 	then he randomly says that i dupe and I’m like I don’t dupe he probably dupes.   
But yeah this community is straight garbage and this is a good game but community is TERRIBLE

This is a great game with lots of thought and care put into it but just one thing could you maybe make it a bit more accessible to get shells like there’s no limit for OMG (OneMoreGame) because then it can make it more accessible to have shells instead of having to wait 24 hours before getting new quests that only give you 100 and I don’t think people want to spend that much money. Just a thought although I hope it gets added, please ￼

This game is really fun and I would recommend it to anybody who likes the ocean and ocean animals like the sharkzilla witch is my favorite other than the seal witch I can do 200k damage with it. Thats why Shark Go is the best game in my opinion. And @Sigmon vr thank you for all of this cause I remember all of it when the metaladon bundle was out so thank you for all of this.

For anyone who plays UG. You know Neutor? He predicted a map for sharks in ug and that never happened but in this game it actually happens. This game is like ug where you ride sharks js like it was ug. The drops are better and you can get op easily. This game is amazing 5 starts

This game has yes, many faults, but above all a great community. If you are planning on downloading this game and giving it a shot just know, don’t try to progress early alone without outside help, me and my friend spent, not kidding, 7 hours early game just to get good stuff. After you’ve progressed early game it becomes AMAZING, I recommend getting double launchers and homing boosters then going into bloop. If you are willing to get started, I garentee you will have a blast playing this game and I’ve gone from a garbage noob to a player that can solo bloop up to wave 30.
      -Don’t give up y’all

I really recommend it the cc program is easy to become a cc, there’s a lot of stuff to explore, it’s really fun with friends, and there’s challenging bosses there’s also a lot of stuff to collect this game is an easy 5 stars ⭐️ ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 100% recommended

The game is very good and I recommend it. I joined the game because I haven’t played in a long time and I just got on my VR and I was killing sharks with people and they started cussing ￼ at me just because I had a bundle of a shark. so what I’m saying is that I recommend it but people might not be nice to you and right now they have a way to get a new powerful shark and it’s by helping out people leveling up I think is a good idea. You’re helping out new players but then if you think of it, you’re really just doing it for yourself not for them. So the game is good ￼ but the community is not that good

reviews.review_title: This is the best game on vr
reviews.review_description: When you first load up the game the community already reach out to help you and helped me get my first shark which was lobster then helped me level up and went as far to help me get weapons and even invited me to play bloop/OMG which started me off with lobster axolotl starfish hammerhead sea dragon crab and so much more I love this game and the community and the moderators always make sure there is something to do I have been playing since metaladon was added and I have never been bored I am trying to get cc for this game becuse I love it so much my yt name is lobstervr808 my goal is to get orca level one and don't hesitate to press install on this game it is the best game I have ever played and will probably never change😁👍

The game is amazing although you will meet mean players but you also meet nice players. The game at first is hard to get good at but join 1-10 server and you’ll find at least one person in one of those lobby’s will help you. When you get good at the game it’s kinda boring but if you get a bundle it makes the game a LOT of fun for example the turtle bundle/not in the game any more but can still come in the shark stop. But with the turtle bundle you can  Eather say-I forgot what it is. But you can change it and make it what ever you want so. You’ll say that and then become a turtle monkey with katana’s.




Owner you should add trading also you should add an easier way to get  the currency in the game-I also forgot the name of😭 another thing you should add is a bigger map I honestly think the map was  pretty big but now that I know where every thing is I feel like it is small l. One thing I think you should change is the PvP button. It is SUPER annoying when your the turtle and spam the katana’s because it will click the button and as soon as you come out the the turtle mode you die because let’s say you were killing a boss with other people you will die because other people shoot the boss and you get one tapped. The game is amazing but theses things will make it better  like if you agree.👍

One of my favourite games. Loads of interaction and interesting updates that many people will love. One problem though is that some things in the game ( bundles and currency etc) are too overpriced so if the game could lower the prices on some stuff that would be great. Definitely recommend this game but although stuff are too expensive they are absolutely worth its price
